metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: Thin orchestrator - close_plan/close_all_plans delegate to close_ops handler which fires trigger events
Thin orchestrator - create_plan delegates to create_ops handler which fires trigger events
Thin orchestrator - restore_plan/recover_plan_from_backup delegate to restore_ops handler which fires trigger events
Thin orchestrator - aggregate_central delegates to aggregate_ops handler which fires trigger events
Lock file .unlink() is infrastructure (process locking), not a business state change
Lock file .unlink() is infrastructure (process locking), not a business state change
Cross-handler import of plan_type_loader.discover_plan_types — mbank needs plan type discovery to process closed plans across all registered types
Cross-handler import of aggregate_ops — push_central calls aggregate_central_impl after pushing data to central
Parent module import needed — push_central invokes aggregate_central for dashboard data
Handler imports trigger module — monitor_ops fires trigger events for registry health changes
Cross-handler import of load_registry — get_open_plans needs registry data to find open plans
Cross-handler import of plan_type_loader — list_ops needs plan type discovery to merge plans from all registries
Cross-handler imports of load_registry, plan_type_loader, display — close needs registry access, type resolution, and formatting
Cross-handler import of load_registry — display needs registry data for plan status formatting
Cross-handler import of load_registry — create needs registry to register new plans
Cross-handler import of load_registry — validate needs registry data to check plan existence
Cross-handler imports of load_registry, plan_type_loader — restore needs registry and type resolution to recover archived plans
Cross-handler import of plan_type_loader — registry loader needs type discovery for auto-healing orphaned entries
location, subject, template_type are local variables from arg parsing, not module-level constants
active_plans, closed_plans, branch_total are local computation variables, not constants
template_path, available are local variables in function scope, not constants
templates_dir, plan_registry_path, module_name are local variables, not constants
template_file, formatted_number, plan_number are local variables, not constants
Local variables in list aggregation functions, not constants
Local variables in close operation functions, not constants
Local variables in plan creation functions, not constants
Local variables in display formatting functions, not constants
Local variables in validation functions, not constants
Local variables in plan processing functions, not constants
Local variables in restore operations, not constants
Local variables in monitor operations, not constants
add_type has docstring — checker 5-line lookahead too small for multi-line signature (6 lines to closing paren)
get_template has docstring — checker 5-line lookahead too small for multi-line signature (9 lines to closing paren)
list_plans_impl has docstring — checker 5-line lookahead too small for multi-line signature (8 lines to closing paren)
create_registry_entry has docstring — checker 5-line lookahead too small for multi-line signature (6 lines to closing paren)
create_plan has docstring — checker 5-line lookahead too small for multi-line signature

Functions have docstrings — checker 5-line lookahead too small for multi-line signatures
Handler imports trigger module — aggregate_ops fires trigger events for plan aggregation changes
Handler imports trigger module — create_ops fires trigger events when plans are created
Cross-handler import of load_registry — get_closed_plans needs registry data to find closed plans
Cross-handler import of registry_ops.get_type_map — parser needs plan type mappings to validate commands
Handler imports trigger module — restore_ops fires trigger events when plans are restored
Cross-handler imports — summary_ops needs plan type loader and registry for summarization
relative_location is a local variable, not a constant
parent_name, error_msg are local variables, not constants
required_deps, error_msg, prefix are local variables, not constants
entry is a local variable, not a constant
plan_info, error_msg are local variables, not constants
Local variables in aggregation functions, not constants
module_name parameter is intentional DI pattern — callers inject module name, auto-detection not needed
target_dir is a local variable, not a constant

notes.usage: Add entries to 'bypass' list to exclude specific violations

example.reason: Circular dependency - logger cannot import CLI

fields.standard: Standard name: cli, imports, naming, etc. (required)
